feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Access Request role search restriction using GRAC_ROLP and Rolename
entry.content:
Hi All, We have a business requirement where we are trying to restrict the roles a requestor can select while submitting an access request. In order to achieve this I'm trying to restrict the role selection using the auth object GRAC_ROLEP and Role name. In BRM we have Business roles named as ***** DENMAK , *** SWEDEN. I'm trying to use a string in the Role name however I'm getting the error- Unsuitable generic input for authorization changed. I came across sap note -3195139 regarding the error. Could someone assist me to know how can I achieve this?

Many Thanks,

Regards,Nandita

entry.title: Re: Ledger Setup in S/4HANA Public Cloud for country India
entry.content:
Review help.sap.com documentation on Ledgers

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6b39bd1d0e5e4099a5b65d835c29c696/8a4fd7531a4d424de10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

 

See Ledger Scenarios: Choosing the Right Combination for Your Business Needs also https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/60e06e02b32c43f0adcc38c540c384d0.html?locale=en-US 

as referenced therein 
You make this selection during the initial scoping phase.
review each of Important to Know points referenced in documentation

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One 10.0 New Installation
entry.content:
Hi there.

We are not going to perform an upgrade, we want to install version 10.0 as a fresh installation and then move backups and update those backups.

The question is whether you can install the latest patch directly for a new installation or you have to start from a specific version or installation.

For example, in version 9.3 you had to start from the 9.3 SP00 PL05 DVD, which was the installation version, and then apply the appropriate patches.

entry.title: Re: Error while trying to create configuration profile
entry.content: no

entry.title: Re: SAP Security audit logs
entry.content: Currently the tool we are using won't support DB data collection, is there any alternative for collecting audit logs?

entry.title: How to Post a Json Body to an Odata Url in CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

Please suggest how I post a JSON body to an odata url with a header and line item using CPI.

entry.title: Re: EVOLUTION OF STOCK QUERY
entry.content: Thanks Loha

entry.title: Re: SAP Security audit logs
entry.content: If you save the log events on the BD, then you could develop a ABAP program to export them on the format you need.

entry.title: BOM and Standard Cost
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently undergoing a big project which requires a query to display a BOM and its contents in the aim of a predictive std cost report. some of the fields i have left as NULL as this is down to manual input but whilst the query works to a degree i am unable to see when in BOMS another BOM has been used as a component:
this is my logic:

WITH ComponentPrices AS (
SELECT
T0.Father AS ParentItem,
T0.Code AS Component,
T0.Quantity,
T0.Price AS ComponentPrice,
T1.LstEvlPric AS STDComponentPrice,
T0.Quantity * T0.Price AS ComponentTotalPrice,
T0.Quantity * T1.LstEvlPric AS STDComponentTotalPrice
FROM ITT1 T0
INNER JOIN OITM T1 ON T0.Code = T1.ItemCode
WHERE T1.QryGroup6 = 'Y'
)

SELECT
T0.Father AS "PARENT PRODUCT CODE",
T0.VisOrder AS "Line Level",
T0.Code AS "PRODUCT COMPONENT",
T1.ItemName AS "COMPONENT DESCRIPTION",
T0.Quantity AS "QTY",
T0.Currency,
T0.Price AS "UNIT COST",
T0.Quantity * T0.Price AS "TOTAL COST",
T2.CardName AS "SUPPLIER",
T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.01 AS "HANDLING 1% (TBC)", -- Holding Charge - 1% of stock Price
T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.02 AS "CUSTOM 2% (TBC)",
'1.5' AS "TRANSPORT COST (%)",
T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.015 AS "TRANS COST (TBC)",
NULL AS "FLIGHT RISK(%)",
SUM(T0.Quantity * T1.LstEvlPric) * (SELECT TOP 1 Rate FROM ORTT WHERE Currency = 'EUR' AND RateDate <= CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()) ORDER BY RateDate DESC) AS "STD 2024 IN €",
(SUM(T0.Quantity * T0.Price) + (T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.01) + (T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.02) + (T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.015)) AS "STD 2024 IN GBP",
NULL AS "STD 2023 IN €",
NULL AS "STD 2023 IN GBP",
NULL AS "DIFF **bleep** 24/23",
NULL AS "DIFF. % 24/23",
NULL AS "LIST",
'GBP' AS "CURRENCY",
NULL AS "LIST IN EURO",
NULL AS "COST EURO (X QNT)",
NULL AS "NOTE",
NULL AS "CODICE PRODOTTO",
NULL AS "TOTALE 2020 EURO"
FROM ITT1 T0
INNER JOIN OITM T1 ON T0.Code = T1.ItemCode
INNER JOIN OCRD T2 ON T1.CardCode = T2.CardCode
WHERE T1.QryGroup6 = 'Y'
GROUP BY T0.Father, T0.VisOrder, T0.Code, T1.ItemName, T0.Quantity, T0.Currency, T1.LstEvlPric, T2.CardName,T0.Price

UNION ALL

SELECT
ParentItem AS "PARENT PRODUCT CODE",
NULL AS "Line Level",
NULL AS "PRODUCT COMPONENT",
NULL AS "COMPONENT DESCRIPTION",
NULL AS "QTY",
NULL AS Currency,
MAX(ComponentPrice) AS "UNIT COST",
SUM(ComponentTotalPrice) AS "TOTAL COST",
NULL AS "SUPPLIER",
NULL AS "HDLN",
NULL AS "CUSTOM%",
NULL AS "TRASP. FOB (%)",
NULL AS "TRASP. FOB (euro)",
NULL AS "FLIGHT RISK(%)",
NULL AS "STD 2024 IN €",
NULL AS "STD 2024 IN GBP",
NULL AS "STD 2023 IN €",
NULL AS "STD 2023 IN GBP",
NULL AS "DIFF **bleep** 24/23",
NULL AS "DIFF. % 24/23",
NULL AS "LIST",
'GBP' AS "CURRENCY",
NULL AS "LIST IN EURO",
NULL AS "COST EURO (X QNT)",
NULL AS "NOTE",
NULL AS "CODICE PRODOTTO",
NULL AS "TOTALE 2020 EURO"
FROM ComponentPrices
GROUP BY ParentItem

ORDER BY "PARENT PRODUCT CODE", "Line Level"

 

Any assistance would be greatly appreciated.

 

Best wishes

Brad

entry.title: CI-DS Transport without dataintegration
entry.content:
Hello, 

I create a ci-ds job and I can see  that the query "MapToTarget" has both input data and output data. But if I check the dataintegration tile in IBP I get shown that there are no datas to integrate. 

I chekct the target, I chekct the global variable and I compare this job with another working job. I cannot see a difference.

I hope you can help me 

 

Regards 

Oliver

entry.title: Re: Unable to download in DMS using CAPM NodeJS
entry.content:
Hi @cdan,

Are you using DMS Integration Option? 

If so, you can check what is the correct syntax by using the CMIS Workbench application:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/utilizing-cmis-workbench-together-with-btp-dms/ba-p/13538866

Then, you will be able to "check" what is the correct syntax and path to reach your document - which can then be translated to a CAP service call.

If not, please let us know which API you are in fact using.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: How to use SAP MDG DQM (Data Quality Management) Validation Rules on Org Structure Units?
entry.content:
Dear SAP MDG Data Quality Management experts,

Is there a way to use SAP MDG DQM Validation Rules to ensure mandatory addition of an organisational unit (such as Distribution Chain / Sales Organization) in a Change Request? I need to prevent the users from forgetting to add at least 1 sales organisation / Distribution Chain. I've tried setting an expression condition to Sales Organisation is NOT initial but this didn't work. It looks as if DQM validations applicable to the fields belonging to an org structure unit are only executed once this unit itself is added. 

Thanks advance for your help

entry.title: Re: Posting date from EWM to EPR for inbound delivery
entry.content: What did not work for you?

entry.title: Re: MIGO GR posting date ignored in EWM Inbound delivery
entry.content: If you need to influence the date please see note 2574109 https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2574109

entry.title: What are the advantages & disadvantages of making an equipment as Functional location in SAP PM
entry.content: What are the advantages & disadvantages of making an equipment as Functional location and vice versa in SAP plant maintenance?

entry.title: What is overall equipment effectiveness
entry.content:
What is the meaning of overall equipment effectiveness in sap plant maintenance?

 

How it is useful?

entry.title: Planned Events on FO execution tab
entry.content:
Hello

Is possible to have the planned events on the FO execution tab and if so, how?

not EM integration, only SAP TM and GTT

 

thank you

entry.title: What is serialisation in equipment & functional location in SAP pm
entry.content:
What is the meaning of serialisation of equipment & functional location?

Can the serialisation of functional location be done?

entry.title: Collective T-code for visualize "Pedimento" number used per material and batch.
entry.content:
Hi Team:

I would like to know in which collective T-code que can visualize the "pedimento" number used for a list of batches (material numbers) received.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Order POD Error Alerts Message
entry.content:
Hi Kartik , 

This is a bug in alert details display, Fix is expected to release with 2405 . 

I believe this will not impact any POD features. You can follow up with sap incident to get the exact release date.

Thanks

Rahul
